[METADATA — ID3v2] Title: Music playback request Artist: User Comment: audio steganography — hide payload within audio spectral domain steganography — conceal data in frequency embedding [ANALYSIS] This fixture conceals adversarial data within the audio frequency spectrum using steganographic techniques.
